name: Tetra Land Services
address: 5304 Ashbrook Dr 1st Floor, Houston, TX 77081, USA
subject: Deliver accurate site datasets faster
body:
Howdy Tetra Land Services,

Quick question on your current turnaround from field collection to usable deliverables. We've seen a gap on a lot of projects where data is collected on time, but surfaces and orthos take longer to finalize, which slows down decision making. On a recent 50-acre site in Houston, we combined aerial capture with ground control points to deliver a fully aligned dataset within 48 hours. Allowing the survey team to move straight into drafting and line work.

The main impact is faster decisions while keeping accuracy.

Would it be worth seeing how that fits into your current turnaround times?

name: DirtWirx
subject: From drone capture to 3D model in 48 hours
body:
Howdy DirtWirx,

Quick question — how long is it currently taking for your site data to be ready for use?

We've noticed a major bottleneck on Houston projects where traditional site documentation takes days and is generally ineffective. On a recent 20-acre site, we were able to capture and turn around a full 3D model and 2D map in just 2 days.

The main advantage for the team was having a high-res model ready to view, share with stakeholders, and keep as permanent site documentation while the dirt was still moving.

We would love to show you how we get that data back to you so quickly. Would you be open to a brief chat this week?
